articles.title: Review and setlist: The Last Dinner Party sets Roadrunner on fire
articles.description:
At a sold-out show, the British five-piece band conjured a night of baroque spectacle, Shakespearean sonnets, and at least one chainmail bikini top.

The post Review and setlist: The Last Dinner Party sets Roadrunner on fire appeared first on Boston.com.
